tools.description: Read-only list of bundled paper strategies and contributor examples.

tools.description: Read-only paper runtime status derived from the bundled scenario.
tools.name: zero_get_runtime_status

tools.description: Read-only paper runtime health, dependency, and breaker status.
tools.name: zero_get_health

tools.description: Read-only replay of the deterministic bundled paper scenario.
tools.name: zero_get_paper_results

tools.description: Read-only paper position state derived from the bundled scenario.
tools.name: zero_get_position_state

tools.description: Read-only paper decision journal tail from the bundled scenario.
tools.name: zero_get_journal_tail

tools.description: Read-only paper rejection audit grouped by stage and reason.
tools.name: zero_get_rejection_audit

tools.description: Read-only public-safe local memory snapshot from bundled paper decisions.
tools.name: zero_get_memory_snapshot

tools.description: Read-only aggregate memory stats without entry bodies.
tools.name: zero_get_memory_stats

tools.description: Read-only paper-only lens, layer, and modifier decision stack.
tools.name: zero_get_decision_stack

tools.description: Read-only paper immune breaker and risk-allowance status.
tools.name: zero_get_immune_status

tools.description: Read-only deterministic paper backtest report without PnL claims.
tools.name: zero_get_backtest_report

tools.description: Read-only hash-only evidence bundle from the bundled paper runtime.
tools.name: zero_get_evidence_bundle

tools.description: Read-only MCP safety catalog for every public tool.
tools.name: zero_get_safety_catalog

resources.description: The deterministic paper scenario used by examples and MCP tools.
resources.name: Bundled Paper Scenario

resources.description: Read-only paper replay result generated from the bundled scenario.
resources.name: Bundled Paper Results

resources.description: Read-only paper runtime status from the bundled scenario.
resources.name: Demo Runtime Status

resources.description: Read-only paper runtime health, dependencies, and breakers.
resources.name: Demo Runtime Health

resources.description: Read-only paper decision journal tail from the bundled scenario.
resources.name: Demo Journal Tail

resources.description: Read-only paper rejection audit from the bundled scenario.
resources.name: Demo Rejection Audit

resources.description: Public-safe local memory extracted from bundled paper decisions.
resources.name: Demo Memory Snapshot

resources.description: Read-only aggregate memory stats without entry bodies.
resources.name: Demo Memory Stats

resources.description: Plan-only genesis proposal classifications for coding agents.
resources.name: Demo Genesis Proposals

resources.description: Paper-only builder, red-team, canary, and calibration status.
resources.name: Demo Evolve Status

resources.description: Paper-only hunt, edge, convergence, thesis, score, meta, and sharpen report.
resources.name: Demo Research Report

resources.description: Paper-only lens, layer, and modifier decision stack for coding agents.
resources.name: Demo Decision Stack

resources.description: Read-only deterministic paper backtest report without PnL claims.
resources.name: Demo Backtest Report

resources.description: Read-only hash-only evidence bundle from the bundled paper runtime.
resources.name: Demo Evidence Bundle

resources.description: Read-only safety classification for every public MCP tool.
resources.name: MCP Safety Catalog
